channel.title: Dragonholic Translations — Free Chapters
channel.description: Your favorite place to read Web Novels & Light Novels. Join our community and connect with us by joining our Discord server.

item.title: Transmigrated Into an Ancient Famine Novel as a Scumbag Alpha (ABO, GL) — Chapter 165
item.description: Chapter 165 His Majesty had the Imperial Observatory calculate the elements. The child of Ye Qing and Jiang Jinhuang would be born in a month lacking the wood element. His Majesty bestowed the name Ye Tan on the child and asked, “What do you two think?” Xiao Wenlan asked, smiling. Her two daughters had no…

item.title: Dressed as the Scumbag Alpha Mom of the Tragic Female Lead (ABO, GL) — Chapter 162
item.description: Chapter 162 “What do you want with me?” Yin Sheng looked impatiently at Liang Mengye in his wheelchair. “Spit it out, no cryptic nonsense. I’m in a hurry.” Liang Mengye was no longer the screen prince he once was. Four years in a wheelchair had worn him thin and gloomy. In the kidnapping case, police…

item.title: After the Top Idol Omega and I Started Living Together — Chapter 128
item.description: Chapter 128 Confetti fluttered through the lively atmosphere, and people cheered and embraced, celebrating the arrival of the new year. The spread-out skirt drew a black-and-white overlapping distance between Lu Zhao and Sheng Jingyu, making them stand far apart. Yet, because of this glance, they felt very close. Although the gestured words had no sound,…

item.title: Accidentally Marked My Ex’s Crush, the Ice-Cold Goddess O — Chapter 127 Delivering Lunch To The Hospital LI Wangsong And Jiang XI Get Married
item.description: Chapter 127: Delivering Lunch to the Hospital (Li Wangsong and Jiang Xi Get Married) Why did Grandma ask so suddenly? Their matter hadn’t been fully revealed to everyone yet. “I do,” Li Wangsong answered without hesitation. Qian Ying said, “If you do, it’s easy. I can agree to your marriage now, but I have conditions.”…

item.title: Sylvie, the Slave Girl (Lily Futa) — Chapter 78
item.description: Time flew by, and Wei Qing soon ushered in her 26th birthday. Unlike the past few years, this time all the people she loved were by her side: family, friends, and Sylvie—yes, still Sylvie. Their relationship had finally gained preliminary recognition from the family. During those three months Wei Qing spent in a coma on…
